prompt: I'm building a code search feature for my Rust monorepo. Which Voyage model should I use, and why? Should I worry about dimensions?

assertions.text: Recommends voyage-code-3 (not voyage-4-large or other generals)
Mentions Matryoshka or dimension-flexibility (1024 default, can truncate)
Surfaces input_type document/query asymmetry (the silent-bug gotcha)
Notes Voyage requires a standard (not integrated) Pinecone index
